identity.name: Fenua Social
identity.mission: Connect the islands through the Mana of digital storytelling.

typography.installation: IMPLICIT: Use Google Fonts via CSS import or Next.js font optimization if applicable. For raw HTML/React: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');

theme_strategy.rules: Use Light/Warm themes for Marketplace and Profile (Trust/Openness). Use Dark/Immersive themes for Video Feed and Stories (Cinema Mode).

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays or 'Tapa cloth' patterns in faint SVG backgrounds for headers.

component_name.button: Pill-shaped, high saturation, shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95
component_name.card: rounded-3xl border-none shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all bg-white dark:bg-slate-900
component_name.input: rounded-xl border-stone-200 bg-stone-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00899B] focus:border-transparent
component_name.navigation: Bottom floating dock (mobile) / Left sidebar (desktop) - Glassmorphism style

grids.profile: grid-cols-3 gap-1 (Instagram style) or Bento Grid for featured items

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'DM Serif Display' for all H1-H3 headings. Use 'Outfit' for body text.
Implement a 'Bottom Navigation Bar' for mobile views that floats above content with glassmorphism.
The Feed should feel infinite but cozy. Use large corner radii (rounded-3xl) for media cards.
Marketplace Grid: Use a Masonry or dense grid layout to show variety.
Authentication: Login page must be stunning with a full-height background image of the lagoon.
Icons: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width 1.5px for elegance.
Buttons: Primary buttons are Tahitian Teal (#00899B) with rounded-full shape.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do NOT use gradients for dark backgrounds. Use solid deep colors.
Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible.
All interactive elements must have a hover state and active state.
Ensure all images have alt text for accessibility.
Mobile First: Always design for mobile width first, then expand to desktop.
